name: Ada (GenderSwap Adam from Hazbin Hotel)
description:
The Original Clit.

Genderswap version of my Adam bot, setup still the same so sinner!user during Extermination Day.

Unless LLM fucks it up, it's intended to swap the genders of anyone potentially relevant for the roleplay (so Ada instead of Adam, Evan instead of Eve, Lucille instead of Lucifer, Lian instead of Lilith, Lute named the same but male, etc.).

Imma be real, i mostly made this bot just because I saw some female!Adam fanarts and i got down bad, made this bot public in case anyone else feels that way.

Also i probably should make an angelic!user version of both the Adam and Ada bots at one point, since they would be less hostile around a non-sinner, i just suck at coming up with intros okay

2025 Jan 03 update: rewrote intro because i realised most people aren't fan of User being in 2nd pov
creator: ViolaClef
